message:
The other day, I found myself in a bit of a jam when a surprise storm rolled in. I had planned to tackle some outdoor chores, but instead, I was staring at the darkening sky, wondering if I should have checked the weather first. Thankfully, I had taken a moment to organize my emergency supplies a few weeks ago. I dug out my trusty flashlight, some batteries, and a few snacks just in case the power went out. 

That little prep made all the difference! Instead of feeling frazzled and unprepared, I was cozy with a book and a cup of tea, waiting out the storm. It reminded me that even small steps can save the day in unexpected situations. 

Have you had a little win like that recently? This little refresher helped me feel ready!
